name: @forwardimpact/gear
description: Shared libraries and services for platform builders and agents — CLIs, retrieval, evaluation, and infrastructure published to npm.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building an agent that needs structured knowledge or typed contracts, with no way to prove the next change improves outcomes.
jobs.bigHire: give humans and agents shared capabilities through the same interface, with tooling to prove changes improved outcomes.
jobs.littleHire: query graphs, run vector search, or expose services as MCP tools without building infrastructure.
jobs.competesWith: hand-rolled retrieval; bespoke wrappers; custom eval harnesses; monolithic platforms; shipping without measuring

forces.push: Every agent project rebuilds plumbing, and improvements are claimed but never measured.
forces.pull: Interoperable libraries and reproducible evals that work standalone or together.
forces.habit: Copy-pasting infrastructure and assuming changes helped because the prompt looks better.
forces.anxiety: Shared libraries mean losing control over the interface contract.

jobs.firedWhen: the libraries diverge from how agents consume them; or eval overhead exceeds the value of knowing.
